idea-plugin.name: Agent Session Relay
idea-plugin.description:
Review an agent's changes in your IDE and relay batched, line-anchored comments back into its running session.

MVP: hover a line to reveal a + gutter icon; click it to open an inline comment box (GitHub/GitLab style) whose range you can drag to resize. Added comments collect in a project batch — shown as gutter markers and in the Relay Review tool window (grouped by file, navigate, delete). Submit writes a REVIEW.md at the project root using Claude Code's @path#L reference syntax, ready to hand to an idle agent session.

action.description: Open an inline review comment box for the selection or caret line
